Turkiye's Youngest Tech Company

The Peak of Technology

Founded by the brightest young minds in the world, Vertex is revolutionizing the technology industry!

190+
Countries
Powered by our technologies & infrastructure

Young Innovators

Our team, averaging 16 years old, represents the next generation of tech visionaries dedicated to pushing boundaries and creating revolutionary solutions.

Multidisciplinary Expertise

We innovate across a wide range of skills, from software development to AI, gaming, music production, and browser technologies.

Global Vision

We are dedicated to positioning Turkiye as a global technology leader by developing world-class products.

Our Projects

Cortex

A revolutionary online and offline AI platform with advanced capabilities.

Mergen

Scalable AI architecture designed for high-performance data processing and machine learning models.

Solar Browser

A next-generation web browser built from scratch for performance and privacy.

All Star

Our mobile game that reached 5 million+ people in 48 hours with 20,000+ downloads.

Ally

Your intelligent health assistant. Providing real-time monitoring and personalized wellness advice.

Our Technology Ecosystem

We use the most powerful tools and modern languages to build the future.

Artificial Intelligence

Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch

Web Technologies

React, Node.js, WebAssembly

Mobile App

Flutter, React Native, Swift

Game Development

Unity, C#, Unreal Engine

2030 Vision

By 2030, Vertex aims to establish a global presence in all markets worldwide, reaching millions of active users on our platforms and becoming a recognized leading force in the global technology industry.

We are committed to continuous innovation, developing our own operating system, and further expanding our AI capabilities to shape the digital future.
